introSection: Wooden Dragons Roller Coaster is a wooden roller coaster located at Jinan Sunac Land in Licheng, Jinan, Shandong, China. It was built by Martin & Vleminckx and designed by The Gravity Group, LLC.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Wooden Dragons Roller Coaster is a wooden roller coaster located at Jinan Sunac Land in Licheng, Jinan, Shandong, China. It was built by Martin & Vleminckx and designed by The Gravity Group, LLC.



2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.
